sourceNote: TCGplayer Authentication Center study, read directly from the primary article (Peter Day, updated 2025-02-27): more than 8,000 Stellar Crown booster packs opened, per-tier rates published with 95% confidence intervals — Double Rare 16.90% ±0.79, Ultra Rare 6.75% ±0.53, ACE SPEC 4.94% ±0.46, Illustration Rare 7.79% ±0.57, Special Illustration Rare 1.11% ±0.22, Hyper Rare 0.73% ±0.18. The study validates our uniform-within-tier assumption: every individual card's measured rate fit within the 95% CI for its rarity (one caveat the authors flag — Dachsbun ex appears short-printed at 0.76% vs the ~1.21% Double Rare average). TCGplayer notes the pull rates are effectively identical across Temporal Forces, Twilight Masquerade, and Stellar Crown by design; the small differences are within the confidence intervals. Stellar Crown's smaller Secret Rare pool (33 vs 56-59) makes any specific chase card easier to hit even though the per-tier odds match.
